title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, Founding Mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans cannot win a race to compete with AI on knowledge and instead emphasizes curiosity, human judgment, and creativity as defining intelligence in the AI age. He uses the example of Srinivasa Ramanujan to illustrate that truly exceptional talent often escapes conventional systems.
